chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. R.A No.192 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.10.2025. The applicants last appeared in this matter on 12.10.2023. Thereafter, they have absent on 01.03.2024, 11.09.2024, 22.04.2025, 29.08.2025 and once again today no intimation is received. None are present. It appears that the applicants have lost their interest in pursuing this revision. The same is dismissed in non-prosecution. JUDGE Asif.I. Khan
